rule_title: If the bitwise operators ~and << are applied to an operand with an underlying type of unsigned char or unsigned short, the result shall be immediately cast to the underlying type of the operand.
source_reference: Klocwork MISRA C++ 2008 checker map + Cppcheck public rule coverage page where available; licensed-source verification required
